OrderSubmitSchema: z.object({ items: z.array(z.object({ id: z.string(), name: z.string().max(200), price: z.number().positive(), quantity: z.number().int().positive() })).min(1), total: z.number().positive(), contactNumber: z.string().regex(/^(\+?60|0)1[0-9]{8,9}$/, 'Invalid Malaysian phone number'), estimatedArrival: z.string().datetime().refine(val => new Date(val) > new Date(Date.now() + 14 * 60 * 1000), { message: 'Arrival must be at least 15 minutes from now' }) })
